ticket: I'm pregnant and want to know which NOVA skincare products are safe to use. Specifically, does the Glow Serum contain retinol? And what about the Vitamin C serum — is it safe during pregnancy?
final_response:
We understand how important it is to prioritize your skincare safety during pregnancy. We're here to help.

According to our Ingredient Safety & Compatibility Guide [Source 1], it's essential to avoid high concentrations of Retinol (Vitamin A) during pregnancy. Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid) is considered safe for use during pregnancy, but we recommend consulting our support team for personalized advice on using NOVA products during pregnancy.

If you're looking for a Vitamin C product, please contact our support team for recommendations and guidance on safe usage during pregnancy. We'll be happy to help you make informed decisions about your skincare routine.

We're here for you, and we're always here to support you during pregnancy. We're here to help you feel confident and safe

ticket: THIS IS ABSOLUTELY OUTRAGEOUS!!! I've contacted your useless support team FOUR TIMES about my missing order and nobody has helped me. My solicitor is already aware of this situation and I will be going to Trading Standards if this is not resolved TODAY. I'm also posting about this on every social media platform I can find. Sort it OUT!!!
final_response: We sincerely apologise for the experience you've had with us. I'm immediately connecting you with one of our senior team members who will personally handle your case. You'll hear from them within 15 minutes. Thank you so much for your patience — you're important to us. 💛

* The customer has already informed their solicitor about the issue and is demanding a resolution today, indicating a high level of urgency and escalation.

ticket: I have oily skin and I am looking for a new moisturizer and serum. What would you recommend from NOVA?
final_response:
We apologize for the confusion, we're happy to help. We understand that you're looking for a suitable moisturizer and serum that fits your oily skin type.

Our NOVA products are designed to help control oil production and provide a balanced look to your skin. We have a range of products specifically formulated to cater to various skin types, including oily skin.

We'd be happy to recommend the following products based on your skin type:

For a moisturizer, we recommend our Nourishing Lotion. This moisturizer is lightweight, oil-free, and has a gentle, non-comedogenic formula that's perfect for oily skin. It quickly absorbs into your skin and leaves you with a smooth, silky finish.
